The '''Intestinal Revenge of Bars Barka''' was a devastating illness transmitted by microbes normally found in the bodies of members of the [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. Several [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] before the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]<ref name="CSWE" /> in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="The New Essential Chronology">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> it was believed to have been carried to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bars Barka]] by a Neimoidian [[Merchant/Legends|trade]] delegation. The global disease infected its [[Ubese/Legends|Ubese]] [[Colonist/Legends|colonists]], resulting in crippling weight loss. The Neimoidians denied any part in the onset of the Intestinal Revenge of Bars Barka.<ref name="CSWE" />
